Home / Products / PVC Tarpaulin Laminating Machine

PVC Tarpaulin Laminating Machine

PVC Tarpaulin Laminating Machine is configured for PVC film, tarpaulin, tent fabric and flex banner. Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production.

Technical specifications

MaterialPVC film, tarpaulin, tent fabric and flex banner
Target width1600-2000 mm
Target speed3-60 m/min
Voltage / frequency380 V, 50 Hz
Power45 kW
Country / regionQuotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production.

Buyer keywords

PVC tarpaulin laminating machine, flex banner laminating machine, tent fabric laminating machine, PVC film coating line

Share material, width, speed, power supply and factory country. An engineer can reply with a practical configuration.
